---
name: art-review
description: Guide for reviewing implementation or changes to the implementation of a game from an art perspective.
---

To review the implementation or changes to the implementation of a game from an art perspective, follow this process:
1. Understand the game theme and design by reading the documents in .github/tasks/game-design.
2. Review the implementation and identify the issues that:
  - are not consistent with the game theme and design;
  - are not appropriate for the game's narration;
  - are not consistent across the game;
  - are not proper Game UI, either the style or the functionality.
  - are not easy-to-understand UI for players.
  - are not easy to use UI for players.
  - are not aesthetically pleasing.
